creator: dsh@bamus.cz
text:
Created attachment 228486
pnp.patch

In https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=253951 lme@ wrote he isn't maintainer anymore, so I'd like to take the maintainership.

Added patch from Oleksandr Kryvulia <shuriku@shurik.kiev.ua> from the same bugreport.

Added optional dependency on net-mgmt/nagios or net-mgmt/nagios4. Copied it from net-mgmt/nagiosgraph.
